purpose: settings.abort_on_inconsistency left unset on an inconsistency-triggering program (IPL conflict sick/healthy on Alice plus a same-predicate bound conflict on Bob): the knob readback pins the default False (pyreason.py:70), and the conflicts are resolved by the inconsistency_check=True default path with the resolution visible in the trace's Consistent / Inconsistency Message columns — the baseline twin whose reasoning probe digests abort-on-inconsistency-on matched at authoring (the harness judges each case within one knob position).
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md setting:abort_on_inconsistency; inconsistency-ipl-resolve program with the knob readback, inconsistency_check left at default
